name: Deploy to Railway (migrate-oracle-to-postgres)

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - migrate-oracle-to-postgres

concurrency:
  group: railway-deploy-migrate-oracle-to-postgres
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    # Official Railway CLI container (works well for CI)
    container: ghcr.io/railwayapp/cli:latest

    env:
      # Railway CLI expects an access token in CI as an env var
      # (Docs show using RAILWAY_TOKEN for non-interactive environments)
      RAILWAY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.RAILWAY_TOKEN }}

      # Target project and environment for non-interactive deploys
      RAILWAY_PROJECT_ID: ${{ secrets.RAILWAY_PROJECT_ID }}
      RAILWAY_ENVIRONMENT: ${{ vars.RAILWAY_ENVIRONMENT }}

      # Target service (recommended to avoid interactive prompts in CI)
      RAILWAY_SERVICE: ${{ vars.RAILWAY_SERVICE }}

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Deploy to Railway
        run: |
          railway up \
            --service "${RAILWAY_SERVICE}" \
            --project "${RAILWAY_PROJECT_ID}" \
            --environment "${RAILWAY_ENVIRONMENT}" \
            --ci
